Class Pyro

java.lang.Object
logic.entity.Character
logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
All Implemented Interfaces:
Attackable, AttackAnimation, Damageable, HaveWeapon
public class Pyro extends MeleeClass
Pyro melee character with very fast single-frame strike timing.
